name: United Arab Emirates

obligation_presets.name: Zakat (annual wealth obligation)
obligation_presets.description: An annual giving obligation: a fixed share of qualifying wealth that has remained above the threshold (nisab) for one full lunar year.

wealth_threshold.note: Nisab is conventionally the value of 85g gold; this pack value is a reference default — edit to the current gold-based figure.

schedule.label: On completion of one lunar year above nisab

obligation_presets.name: Corporate tax estimate
obligation_presets.description: Federal corporate tax on business profits above the threshold.

schedule.label: File and pay within 9 months of FY end

obligation_presets.name: Savings commitment
obligation_presets.description: A self-imposed rule: set aside a fixed share of monthly income.

versions.note: Due the 28th of the month following each quarter; stagger varies by registration.
Standard rate on most goods and services.

seasonal_notes.note: Fasting month — food/charity spending patterns typically shift; giving rises.

disclaimer: Figures produced from this pack are ESTIMATES for planning, not professional tax or religious-obligation advice. The pack's rates, thresholds, and dates are shown (with effective dates) so you can verify them; confirm with a qualified professional.
